name: VWAP-EMA Failure Reversal Strategy
desc: [Claude] Python conversion — strategies/vwap_ema_failure.py + backtest_engine.py runner (equity 1-min data, VWAP/EMA10 regime, R-multiple partial exits, 3:15 EOD force-exit). Configs added: vwap_v1 (TCS), vwap_v2 (POLYCAB), vwap_v3 (RELIANCE). Also added log.info SIGNAL/EXIT lines (project convention) so this exports a Pine Logs file matching backtest_engine.py's match-status comparison.
